fields.summary: Creates a new typeface by cloning this typeface with the specified font arguments.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> customized by <paramref name="args" />, or <see langword="null" /> if the operation failed.

params.args: The arguments specifying the variation position, palette, and other customizations.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface by cloning this typeface and applying the specified color palette.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> using the specified palette, or <see langword="null" /> if the operation failed.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette to use.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface by cloning this typeface and applying the specified variation design position.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with the specified variation position, or <see langword="null" /> if the operation failed.

params.position: The variation design position coordinates to apply.

fields.summary: Gets an empty typeface that contains no glyphs.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> instance with no glyphs.

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the variation axis definitions for the typeface.
fields.returns: The number of axes written into <paramref name="axes" />.

params.axes: The span to receive the variation axis definitions.

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the current variation design position of the typeface.
fields.returns: The number of coordinates written into <paramref name="coordinates" />.

params.coordinates: The span to receive the variation position coordinates.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this typeface contains no glyphs.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the typeface has a glyph count of zero; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined for this typeface.
fields.value: The number of variation axes, or 0 if the typeface is not a variable font.

fields.summary: Gets an array of variation axis definitions for this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> entries, or an empty array if the typeface has no variation axes.

fields.summary: Gets an array of the current variation design position coordinates for this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> entries, or an empty array if none are set.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation position coordinates currently set for this typeface.
fields.value: The number of variation position entries, or 0 if none are set.
